text: FEEL THE WRATH OF A RICHTON, SCUM!
subject: Dire Rat

text: BEHOLD, THE REAPING OF THE UNDEAD!
subject: Skeleton

text: THE WEAK FALL BEFORE THE MIGHT OF RICHTON!
subject: Kobold

text: ANOTHER FOUL BEAST FALLS BEFORE MY BLADE!
subject: Dire Rat

text: ANOTHER VERMIN FALLS BEFORE MY BLADE!
subject: Kobold

text: FALL BEFORE ME, UNDEAD SCOURGE!
subject: Skeletal Champion

text: "ANOTHER WRETCHED CREATURE FALLS BEFORE THE MIGHT OF RICHTON!
subject: Dire Rat

text: FELL BEFORE MY BLADE, DID HE?
subject: Monk

text: ANOTHER VERMINS' LIFE SNATCHED FROM THE DARK!
subject: Dire Rat

text: YOUR DEATH WAS AS SWIFT AS YOUR WRETCHED LIFE!
subject: Giant Centipede

text: FALLEN INTO SILENCE, YOU PATHETIC CUR!
subject: Whispering Cultist

text: "ANOTHER MONSTER FALLS TO MY BLADE!
subject: Ogre

text: FEAST YOUR EYES, FILTH!
subject: Dire Ape

text: BEHOLD, I HAVE SLAUGHTERED THIS FILTHY CREATURE!

text: "ANOTHER FILTHY ABOMINATION FALLS TO MY BLADE!

text: "ANOTHER SCURVY RUFFIAN FALLS TO MY BLADE!

text: "ANOTHER BRUTALIZED VERMIN FALLS BEFORE THE MIGHT OF RICHTON!

text: FALL BEFORE THE MIGHT OF RICHTON!
subject: Goblin Shaman

text: "ANOTHER MONSTER FALLS BEFORE MY BLADE!

text: FALL BEFORE THE BLOOD OF RICHTON, SPITEFUL RABBLE!
